name: dkan-ai-skills
description: Local marketplace for the drupal-dkan-ai plugin: general Drupal 10.2+ / 11 module development, DKAN 4.x, Drupal AI, and MCP Server module authoring, DKAN core contribution, DCAT-US / open-data metadata, and DKAN's decoupled JavaScript frontend — skills and commands.

plugins.name: drupal-dkan-ai
plugins.description: Skills and slash commands for general Drupal 10.2+ / 11 module development and for authoring custom Drupal modules that extend DKAN 4.x, the Drupal AI module, and the MCP Server module, for contributing to DKAN core itself, for the DCAT-US / open-data metadata specs DKAN implements, and for DKAN's decoupled JavaScript frontend.
